name: Arm Holdings plc
h1: ARM Holdings's GCC footprint in India
lede: ARM Holdings runs three capability centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Noida, covering engineering & design, built over 22 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one ARM Holdings office in India. We map three, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Arm Holdings plc GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: ARM Holdings runs 3 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Noida), covering engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: Sr. Vice President, President & MD, Arm-India

about.description: ARM Holdings's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Noida, spanning engineering & design. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 27 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does ARM Holdings operate in India?
faq.a: ARM Holdings operates 3 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does ARM Holdings have GCC centers in?
faq.a: ARM Holdings's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru and Noida.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does ARM Holdings run in India?
faq.a: ARM Holdings runs engineering & design centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at ARM Holdings's India GCCs?
faq.a: ARM Holdings's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads ARM Holdings's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 27 leaders at ARM Holdings's India centers, across IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
